global_description: A small to medium-sized aquatic mammal with a sleek, elongated body, dense waterproof fur, typically brown or gray. It has a flat, broad head, small rounded ears, and a long, muscular tail. The limbs are short with webbed feet, adapted for swimming.

part_details.head: Flat and broad with small rounded ears
part_details.body: Sleek and elongated with dense fur
part_details.fur: Dense and waterproof, typically brown or gray

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail at rear
Limbs attached to sides of body
